ast.name: ariaLabel
ast.source: You have merge conflicts. Resolve them and commit afterwards.
ast.target: 存在合并冲突。请解决冲突后再提交。

ast.name: error
ast.source: This browser lacks typed array (Uint8Array) support which is required by `buffer` v5.x. Use `buffer` v4.x if you require old browser support.
ast.target: 此浏览器缺少 `buffer` v5.x 所需的类型化数组 (Uint8Array) 支持。如需旧版浏览器支持，请使用 `buffer` v4.x。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error while adding askpass script to exclude file:
ast.target: 将 askpass 脚本添加到排除文件时出错：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to parse lines, starting in 0!

ast.name: error
ast.source: Unknown state reached while processing groups of lines
ast.target: 处理行组时达到未知状态

ast.name: info
ast.source: A fatal exception occurred in a previous task, the queue has been purged: %o
ast.target: 先前任务中发生致命异常，队列已被清除：%o

ast.name: info
ast.source: exitCode=%s handling with custom error handler
ast.target: exitCode=%s 使用自定义错误处理程序处理

ast.name: info
ast.source: custom error handler treated as success
ast.target: 自定义错误处理程序已视为成功

ast.name: info
ast.source: handling as error: exitCode=%s stdErr=%s rejection=%o
ast.target: 作为错误处理：exitCode=%s stdErr=%s rejection=%o

ast.name: log
ast.target: 在 "FileSystem.exists()" 函数中发生未处理的错误

ast.name: log
ast.source: No tracking branch found. Ignoring pull of main repo and updating submodules only.
ast.target: 未找到跟踪分支。忽略主仓库拉取，仅更新子模块。

ast.name: log
ast.source: No tracking branch found. Ignoring push of main repo and updating submodules only.
ast.target: 未找到跟踪分支。忽略主仓库的推送，仅更新子模块。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Encountered network error, but already in offline mode
ast.target: 遇到网络错误，但已处于离线模式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable to use one interval for commit and another for sync.
ast.target: 启用后，可为提交和同步分别设置不同的间隔时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Push commits every X minutes. Set to 0 (default) to disable.
ast.target: 每 X 分钟推送提交。设置为 0（默认值）可禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pull changes every X minutes. Set to 0 (default) to disable.
ast.target: 每 X 分钟拉取更改。设置为 0（默认值）可禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You will get a pop up to specify your message.
ast.target: 您将看到一个弹出窗口，用于指定您的消息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Available placeholders: {{date}} (see below), {{hostname}} (see below), {{numFiles}} (number of changed files in the commit) and {{files}} (changed files in commit message).
ast.target: 可用占位符：{{date}}（见下文）、{{hostname}}（见下文）、{{numFiles}}（提交中更改的文件数）和 {{files}}（提交消息中的更改文件）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Available placeholders: {{date}} (see below), {{hostname}} (see below), {{numFiles}} (number of changed files in the commit) and {{files}} (changed files in commit message). Leave empty to require manual input on each commit.
ast.target: 可用占位符：{{date}}（见下文）、{{hostname}}（见下文）、{{numFiles}}（提交中已更改文件的数量）和 {{files}}（提交消息中的已更改文件）。留空则每次提交时需手动输入。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A script that is run using 'sh -c' to generate the commit message. May be used to generate commit messages using AI tools. Available placeholders: {{hostname}}, {{date}}.
ast.target: 使用 'sh -c' 运行的脚本，用于生成提交消息。可用于借助 AI 工具生成提交消息。可用占位符：{{hostname}}、{{date}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify custom hostname for every device. Defaults to the OS hostname if not set on desktop.
ast.target: 为每台设备指定自定义主机名。若未在桌面端设置，则默认使用操作系统主机名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Decide how to integrate commits from your remote branch into your local branch.
ast.target: 决定如何将远程分支的提交集成到本地分支。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Decide how to solve conflicts when pulling remote changes. This can be used to favor your local changes or the remote changes automatically.
ast.target: 决定拉取远程更改时如何解决冲突。可用于自动优先采用本地更改或远程更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically pull commits when Obsidian starts.
ast.target: Obsidian 启动时自动拉取提交。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Commit-and-sync with default settings means staging everything -> committing -> pulling -> pushing. Ideally this is a single action that you do regularly to keep your local and remote repository in sync.
ast.target: 使用默认设置的提交并同步意味着暂存所有更改 -> 提交 -> 拉取 -> 推送。理想情况下，这是一个您定期执行的单一操作，以保持本地和远程仓库同步。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hunks are sections of grouped line changes right in your editor.
ast.target: 区块是编辑器中分组行更改的区段。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This allows you to see your changes right in your editor via colored markers and stage/reset/preview individual hunks.
ast.target: 这使您能够通过彩色标记直接在编辑器中查看更改，并可暂存/重置/预览各个区块。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adds commands to stage/reset individual Git diff hunks and navigate between them via 'Go to next/prev hunk' commands.
ast.target: 添加命令以暂存/重置各个 Git diff 区块，并通过“转到下一个/上一个区块”命令在它们之间导航。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the author of the commit in the history view.
ast.target: 在历史视图中显示提交的作者。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the date of the commit in the history view. The {{date}} placeholder format is used to display the date.
ast.target: 在历史视图中显示提交的日期。{{date}} 占位符格式用于显示日期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On slower machines this may cause lags. If so, just disable this option.
ast.target: 在性能较低的机器上，这可能会导致延迟。如有此情况，请禁用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Milliseconds to wait after file change before refreshing the Source Control View.
ast.target: 文件更改后等待刷新源代码管理视图的毫秒数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the style for the diff view. Note that the actual diff in "Split" mode is not generated by Git, but the editor itself instead so it may differ from the diff generated by Git. One advantage of this is that you can edit the text in that view.
ast.target: 设置差异视图的样式。请注意，"拆分"模式下的实际差异并非由 Git 生成，而是由编辑器本身生成，因此可能与 Git 生成的差异有所不同。这样做的一个优点是您可以在该视图中编辑文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Disable informative notifications for git operations to minimize distraction (refer to status bar for updates).
ast.target: 禁用 Git 操作的信息通知以减少干扰（请参阅状态栏以获取更新）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Disable error notifications of any kind to minimize distraction (refer to status bar for updates).
ast.target: 禁用任何类型的错误通知以减少干扰（请参阅状态栏以获取更新）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Don't show notifications when there are no changes to commit or push.
ast.target: 当没有要提交或推送的更改时，不显示通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Obsidian must be restarted for the changes to take affect.
ast.target: 必须重新启动 Obsidian 才能使更改生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add "Stage", "Unstage" and "Add to .gitignore" actions to the file menu.
ast.target: 将"暂存"、"取消暂存"和"添加到 .gitignore"操作添加到文件菜单。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Type in your password. You won't be able to see it again.
ast.target: 输入您的密码。此后将无法再次查看。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: These settings usually don't need to be changed, but may be required for special setups.
ast.target: 这些设置通常无需更改，但在特殊配置下可能需要调整。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: "Commit-and-sync" and "pull" takes care of submodules. Missing features: Conflicted files, count of pulled/pushed/committed files. Tracking branch needs to be set for each submodule.
ast.target: “Commit-and-sync”和“pull”操作会处理子模块。缺失功能：冲突文件、拉取/推送/提交的文件计数。需为每个子模块设置跟踪分支。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whenever a checkout happens on the root repository, recurse the checkout on the submodules (if the branches exist).
ast.target: 当根仓库执行检出操作时，递归对子模块执行检出（若分支存在）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the path to the Git binary/executable. Git should already be in your PATH. Should only be necessary for a custom Git installation.
ast.target: 指定 Git 二进制文件/可执行文件的路径。Git 应已包含在 PATH 环境变量中。仅自定义 Git 安装时需要设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use each line for a new environment variable in the format KEY=VALUE .
ast.target: 每行用于设置一个新的环境变量，格式为 KEY=VALUE。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use each line for one path
ast.target: 每行用于指定一个路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Removing previously added environment variables will not take effect until Obsidian is restarted.
ast.target: 移除先前添加的环境变量后，需重启 Obsidian 方可生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Sets the relative path to the vault from which the Git binary should be executed.
             Mostly used to set the path to the Git repository, which is only required if the Git repository is below the vault root directory. Use "\\" instead of "/" on Windows.
ast.target:
设置 Git 二进制文件应基于的仓库相对路径。
             主要用于设置 Git 仓库路径，仅当 Git 仓库位于仓库根目录之下时需要。在 Windows 上请使用 "\\" 代替 "/"。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Corresponds to the GIT_DIR environment variable. Requires restart of Obsidian to take effect. Use "\" instead of "/" on Windows.
ast.target: 对应 GIT_DIR 环境变量。需重启 Obsidian 方可生效。在 Windows 上请使用 "\\" 代替 "/"。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Disables the plugin on this device. This setting is not synced.
ast.target: 在此设备上禁用该插件。此设置不会同步。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you like this Plugin, consider donating to support continued development.
ast.target: 如果您喜欢此插件，请考虑捐赠以支持持续开发。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If and how the author is displayed
ast.target: 是否以及如何显示作者

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If and how the date and time of authoring the line is displayed
ast.target: 是否以及如何显示该行的创作日期与时间

ast.target: 为自动提交与同步拆分计时器

ast.target: 手动提交时的提交信息

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Status bar with summary of line changes

ast.name: setName

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 源代码管理视图刷新间隔

ast.name: setName

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Follow movement and copies across files and commits

ast.name: setName

ast.name: setPlaceholder

You can always see the logs of this and every other plugin by opening the console with

ast.target: simple-git 弃用通知：git.silent：日志记录应使用 `debug` 库 / `DEBUG` 环境变量进行配置，此方法将被移除。

Either your local time-zone (default),

ast.target: ），因为它们会自动适应主题更改。

ast.name: text
ast.source: List of available CSS variables in Obsidian

ast.name: text
ast.source: Whitespace and newlines are interpreted as part of the document and in changes by default (hence not ignored). This makes the last line being shown as 'changed' when a new subsequent line is added, even if the previously last line's text is the same.
ast.target: 默认情况下，空白字符和换行符被视为文档及变更的一部分（因此不会被忽略）。这会导致在添加后续新行时，即使前一行文本内容未变，最后一行仍显示为“已更改”。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you don't care about purely-whitespace changes (e.g. list nesting / quote indentation changes), then activating this will provide more meaningful change detection.
ast.target: 若您不关注纯空白字符的变更（例如列表嵌套/引用缩进变更），启用此选项将提供更有意义的变更检测。

ast.name: text

regex.target: setDesc("将弹出窗口让您指定信息。")

setName("手动提交时的提交信息")

regex.source: setDesc("Available placeholders: {{date}} (see below), {{hostname}} (see below), {{numFiles}} (number of changed files in the commit) and {{files}} (changed files in commit message). Leave empty to require manual input on each commit.")
regex.target: setDesc("可用占位符：{{date}}（见下文），{{hostname}}（见下文），{{numFiles}}（提交中更改的文件数量）和{{files}}（提交信息中的更改文件）。留空以在每次提交时要求手动输入。")

regex.source: setDesc("A script that is run using 'sh -c' to generate the commit message. May be used to generate commit messages using AI tools. Available placeholders: {{hostname}}, {{date}}.")
regex.target: setDesc("使用 'sh -c' 运行的脚本，用于生成提交信息。可用于使用 AI 工具生成提交信息。可用占位符：{{hostname}}，{{date}}。")

regex.source: setDesc("Specify custom hostname for every device. Defaults to the OS hostname if not set on desktop.")
regex.target: setDesc("为每个设备指定自定义主机名。如果在桌面上未设置，则默认使用操作系统主机名。")

regex.source: setName("List filenames affected by commit in the commit body")
regex.target: setName("在提交正文中列出受提交影响的文件名")

regex.source: setDesc("Decide how to integrate commits from your remote branch into your local branch.")
regex.target: setDesc("决定如何将远程分支的提交合并到本地分支。")

regex.source: setDesc("Decide how to solve conflicts when pulling remote changes. This can be used to favor your local changes or the remote changes automatically.")
regex.target: setDesc("决定在拉取远程更改时如何解决冲突。可用于自动偏向本地更改或远程更改。")

regex.source: setDesc("Automatically pull commits when Obsidian starts.")
regex.target: setDesc("Obsidian 启动时自动拉取提交。")

regex.source: setDesc("Commit-and-sync with default settings means staging everything -> committing -> pulling -> pushing. Ideally this is a single action that you do regularly to keep your local and remote repository in sync.")
regex.target: setDesc("使用默认设置的提交并同步意味着：暂存所有更改 -> 提交 -> 拉取 -> 推送。理想情况下，这是一项你定期执行的单一操作，用于保持本地和远程仓库同步。")

regex.source: setDesc(`Most of the time you want to push after committing. Turning this off turns a commit-and-sync action into commit ${i.settings.pullBeforePush?"and pull ":""}only. It will still be called commit-and-sync.`)
regex.target: setDesc(`大多数情况下，你希望在提交后进行推送。关闭此选项会将提交并同步操作转换为仅提交${i.settings.pullBeforePush?"并拉取 ":""}。它仍然被称为提交并同步。`)

regex.source: setDesc(`On commit-and-sync, pull commits as well. Turning this off turns a commit-and-sync action into commit ${i.settings.disablePush?"":"and push "}only.`)
regex.target: setDesc(`在提交并同步时，也会拉取提交。关闭此选项会将提交并同步操作转换为仅提交${i.settings.disablePush?"":"并推送 "}。`)

regex.source: setDesc("Hunks are sections of grouped line changes right in your editor.")
regex.target: setDesc("块是编辑器中分组的行更改段落。")

regex.source: setDesc("This allows you to see your changes right in your editor via colored markers and stage/reset/preview individual hunks.")
regex.target: setDesc("这使你能够通过彩色标记在编辑器中直接查看更改，并对单个块进行暂存/重置/预览。")

regex.source: setDesc("Adds commands to stage/reset individual Git diff hunks and navigate between them via 'Go to next/prev hunk' commands.")
regex.target: setDesc("添加命令以暂存/重置单个 Git 差异块，并通过‘转到下一个/上一个块’命令在它们之间导航。")

regex.source: setDesc('Set the style for the diff view. Note that the actual diff in "Split" mode is not generated by Git, but the editor itself instead so it may differ from the diff generated by Git. One advantage of this is that you can edit the text in that view.')
